title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 103.155 - Reimbursement by participating member agency of start-up costs incurred solely for member agency
text:
103.155.  Reimbursement by participating member agency of start-up costs incurred solely for member agency. — If so determined by the board, a participating member agency shall reimburse the plan for any initial start-up costs that are incurred by the plan solely on behalf of the participating member agency and necessary in order for the participating member agency to be included in the plan.
(L. 1992 H.B. 1574 § 4 subsec. 8)
